title: Zoro Faces Mr. 1
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on zoro faces mr. 1, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Zoro Faces Mr. 1. Zoro fights Mr. 1 and begins confronting the challenge of cutting steel itself. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Thank you, thank you. Stick around, as I'll be signing autographs later.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Wow, he's really not moving...D-DID 'treally work that well...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: O-okay, just calm down... this is your big chance!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're next: Up in line for a 5-ton Clobberin"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn... You're... Really startin'... To piss me off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You dumbass! There's... Huff Huff No point... HOFF Huff!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: In using that hammer if you can't hit me!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Let me tell you a little something... You've probably already heard that many Baroque Works agents have been defeated by the Straw-Eat crew, but...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It was I who was single- handedly responsible for all of it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He took a 5 ton hammer to the head and he's still standing!?

summary: This part develops zoro faces mr. 1 and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
